CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. The box will automatically be checked if there is a Monitoring Event of type "90+ Days Delinquent" or "Notice of Foreclosure Proceedings" in which Intervention with Homeowner is not blank or "Program did not intervene or refer homeowner to services."
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The box will automatically be checked if there is a Monitoring Event of type "90+ Days Delinquent" or "Notice of Foreclosure Proceedings" in which Intervention with Homeowner is not blank or "Program did not intervene or refer homeowner to services."
CustomField.label: Has Had Serious Delinquency Intervention
